name: CatalogHandler
summary: The CatalogHandler class is a class from which the user can query catalog instances.

constructors.name: CatalogHandler
constructors.summary: Creates a new catalog handler instance.

methods.name: ExportProfileItems
methods.signature: public bool ExportProfileItems(IList<string> profileNames, string path, string fileName)
methods.summary: Exports the profile items in the profile database to given path and file name. Currently library profiles, sketch profiles and clb profiles are supported. Library profiles are exported to *.lis format. Sketch profiles are exported to *.uel format. Clb profiles are exported to *.clb format. If profiles are not available, export fails. If path is empty, export fails. If file name is empty, export fails.

methods.name: GetBoltItems
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all bolt items.

returns.doc: A BoltItemEnumerator of all bolt items.

methods.name: GetComponentItems
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all component items.

returns.doc: A ComponentItemEnumerator of all component items.

methods.name: GetConnectionStatus
methods.summary: Returns true if a proper connection to the Tekla Structures process has been established. Currently, there's no way to re-establish the connection.

methods.name: GetDrawingItems
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all drawing items.

returns.doc: A DrawingItemEnumerator of all drawing catalog items.

methods.name: GetLibraryProfileItems
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of library profile items.

returns.doc: A ProfileItemEnumerator of library profile items.

methods.name: GetMaterialItems
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all material items.

returns.doc: A MaterialItemEnumerator of all material items.

methods.name: GetMaterialMarketSizes
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all material marketsizes. Data is read from XS_PROFDB\marketsizes.dat file.

returns.doc: A MaterialMarketSizesItemEnumerator of all material marketsizes.

throws.when: Thrown when initialization of MaterialMarketSizesItemEnumerator fails.

methods.name: GetMeshItems
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of mesh items.

methods.name: GetParametricProfileItems
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of parametric profile items.

returns.doc: A ProfileItemEnumerator of parametric profile items.

methods.name: GetPrinterItems
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all printer items.

returns.doc: A PrinterItemEnumerator of all printer items.

methods.name: GetProfileItems
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all profile items.

returns.doc: A ProfileItemEnumerator of all profile items.

methods.name: GetRebarItems
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of rebar items.

methods.name: GetShapeItems
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all shape items.

returns.doc: A ShapeItemEnumerator of all shape items.

methods.name: GetSteelFinishItems
methods.summary: Returns the collection of all steel finish items.

returns.doc: The collection of all steel finish items.

methods.name: GetUserPropertyItems.
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all user property items.

returns.doc: A UserPropertyItemEnumerator of all user property items.

methods.name: GetUserPropertyItems(CatalogObjectTypeEnum)
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of user property items of the given object type.

params.name: objectType
params.doc: The object type to be used.

returns.doc: A UserPropertyItemEnumerator of user property items of the given object type.

methods.name: ImportBoltItems
methods.summary: Imports bolt items and their assembly information (*.bass) from folder to bolt assembly catalog and bolt catalog. Import overrides the existing bolts in the catalog without any warnings.

params.name: path
params.doc: The path to be used for import.

methods.name: ImportCustomComponentItems
methods.summary: Imports custom component items (*.uel) from path to component catalog. Import overrides the existing custom components in the catalog without any warnings.

params.name: path
params.doc: The path to be used for import. This can be a uel file or a folder containing one or more uel files.

methods.name: ImportDrawingItems
methods.summary: Imports drawing setting items (*.tsds) from specified folder to model folder. Import throws exception if model is not open. Import overrides the existing drawing items in the catalog without any warnings.

params.name: path
params.doc: The path to be used for import.

methods.name: ImportLibraryProfileItems
methods.summary: Imports library profile items (*.lis) from folder to profile catalog. Import overrides the existing profiles in the catalog without any warnings.

params.name: path
params.doc: The path to be used for import.

methods.name: ImportMaterialItems
methods.summary: Imports material items (*.lis) from folder to material catalog. Import overrides the existing materials in the catalog without any warnings.

params.name: path
params.doc: The path to be used for import.

methods.name: ImportMeshItems
methods.summary: Imports mesh items (*.mexp) from folder to mesh catalog. Import overrides the existing mesh item in the catalog without any warnings.

params.name: path
params.doc: The path to be used for import.

methods.name: ImportParametricProfileItems
methods.summary: Imports parametric profile items (*.uel) from folder to profile catalog. Import overrides the existing profiles in the catalog without any warnings.

params.name: path
params.doc: The path to be used for import.

methods.name: ImportRebarItems
methods.summary: Imports rebar items (*.rexp) from folder to reinforcement catalog. Import overrides the existing rebar item in the catalog without any warnings.

params.name: path
params.doc: The path to be used for import.

methods.name: ImportShapeItems
methods.summary: Imports shape geometry items (*.tsc) from specified folder. Import throws exception if model is not open. Import overrides the existing shape items in the catalog without any warnings.

params.name: path
params.doc: The path to be used for import.

methods.name: ImportShapeItemsFromGeometryFiles
methods.summary: Imports shape geometry items from geometry files in specified folder. Import supports following file formats: ".skp", ".dxf", ".dwg", ".step", ".iges", ".stp", ".igs", ".ifc", ".dgn", ".trb" File name is used as shape name. Import throws exception if model is not open. Import overrides the existing shape items in the catalog without any warnings.

params.name: path
params.doc: The path to be used for import.

methods.name: SaveProfileDatabase
methods.summary: Saves the profile database.
